mapper.select: SELECT id, unit_id, user_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, check_in_address, check_out_address, valid_flag, create_time FROM attendance_record WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance_record SET unit_id = #{unitId}, user_id = #{userId}, attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, check_in_address = #{checkInAddress}, check_out_address = #{checkOutAddress}, valid_flag = #{validFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
